seo.homeLead: This page brings together the Syrian pound against major currencies, gold and fuel prices, plus global FX pairs and cryptocurrencies. Data is refreshed regularly from multiple sources for quick market context.
seo.homeKeywords: Syrian pound rate, SYP exchange, USD to SYP, gold price, fuel, crypto

legal.privacyP1: We do not sell your personal data. We may collect minimal technical information (such as browser type) to improve performance.
legal.privacyP2: Prices and indicators shown here are approximate and indicative only; they may differ from real market rates or bureau rates—please verify with a trusted source before any financial decision.
legal.privacyP3: By using the site you agree to this policy. For questions, use contact channels if we publish them later on the site.
legal.aboutP1: “Syrian Pound Rate” is an Arabic-first dashboard that groups SYP exchange indicators, gold, fuel, and crypto prices in one readable layout for phone and desktop.
legal.aboutP2: We aggregate public data and specialist sites, with optional sync and adjustments from the admin panel. The goal is a quick market snapshot, not financial advice.
legal.aboutP3: Numbers are reference values and may lag the live market; always check official or bureau rates when it matters.
